content_of_post_to_comment:
I made this youtube video about screen and what does it do to your brain, drop your thoughts on the animation style and info! Thank you!!!

https://youtu.be/_sKT5jVqblc
comment: I liked that the topic was about what screens are doing to the brain instead of treating screen time as automatically good or bad. For animation, I think the strongest moments are when the visuals reinforce the point being made rather than just keeping movement on screen. Curious if you noticed any retention differences from previous videos with a different style.
